message:
fix: improve writing page layout and card component responsiveness

- writing/page.tsx: refactor writing page layout with improved responsive
  grid behavior and better content organization (42 lines changed)
- project-card.tsx: enhance project card with improved hover states and
  layout consistency across viewport sizes
- writing-card.tsx: improve writing card component with better typography
  and responsive image handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
